requirements.summary: Remove the 'publish detail' UI element (caffeine.ai attribution or deployment metadata) from the app's layout so it is no longer visible to users
acceptanceCriteria: No publish detail, deployment info, or caffeine.ai attribution text is visible anywhere in the app UI.
The rest of the layout (masthead, navigation, footer copyright, content) remains intact and unaffected.
The change is applied globally across all pages.

file_operations.description: Remove the caffeine.ai attribution or publish detail element from the footer section while preserving the copyright notice and all other layout elements. Ensure the footer structure remains valid and styled appropriately after the removal.
